name: Amhara Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: the heraldic gold of the Amhara people
the courage of the Amhara people

description: A yellow field with a large red triangle issuing from the hoist (forming a per-bend/triangular division) and a yellow Star of Solomon (eight-pointed star) at the centre.
history: The Amhara Region is one of the regional states of the Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia, established under the 1995 Constitution. The eight-pointed Star of Solomon recalls the Solomonic dynasty that long ruled the Ethiopian highlands.

features.symbolism: the Solomonic dynasty and Ethiopian Christian heritage
